extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each category: I excluded all 'By' rows, counted 0 criminal proceedings against the company, subsidiaries, promoters, directors and KMP, counted 2 statutory/regulatory proceedings against promoters, and counted 3 tax proceedings against the company; there were no such proceedings against the subsidiary. The quantified aggregate amount against the company and subsidiary group is the Company's ₹35.70 million tax amount; the promoter amount of ₹32.96 million is excluded, giving ₹35.70 million = ₹3.57 crore. The contingent-liabilities table is consolidated through the subsidiary and has no stated Total row, so I summed the latest June 30, 2025 line items of ₹34.80 million, ₹0.90 million, ₹30.07 million and ₹9.17 million, totaling ₹74.94 million = ₹7.494 crore. The company-wide top-five customer concentration for the latest full fiscal year, Fiscal 2025, is 21.79% of total sales (the table's denominator, rather than an interim period or segment-only figure); no company-wide top-ten percentage is disclosed. The source monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing million amounts by 10.
